tools.name: hash_identify
tools.description: Identify hash types from a sample. Returns candidate list with hashcat mode and john format. Covers: Kerberos AS-REP/TGS, NetNTLMv2, bcrypt, sha512/256crypt, md5crypt, phpass, KeePass, Django PBKDF2, MySQL-sha1, SHA-512/256/1, NTLM/MD5. This is the Rust SDK proof plugin — compare its ~100 KB wasm to the ~3.5 MB Go equivalent.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"hash":{"type":"string","description":"A sample hash value or hash line"}},"required":["hash"]}
